title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 5: The Yoga of Renunciation
description: Chapter 5 of the Bhagavad Gita: The wise see no difference between renunciation and selfless action — both lead to liberation.
introduction: Chapter 5 of the Bhagavad Gita: The wise see no difference between renunciation and selfless action — both lead to liberation.

translation.text: The wise, engaged in selfless action, attain the Brahman. They are free from the bondage of rebirth.
